description_long: A loosely stacked group of cardboard boxes of various sizes is arranged in a somewhat haphazard pile. The boxes are all made from brown corrugated cardboard, with visible tape sealing the tops and edges. Several of the boxes are marked with the word 'MoveOn' and standard shipping and handling symbols, such as arrows and fragile icons. The boxes show realistic creases, folds, and slight deformations, suggesting they have been handled or moved. The arrangement creates a sense of depth, with some boxes partially obscured and others prominently displayed. The overall look is typical of parcels found in moving scenarios, warehouses, or urban delivery drop-offs.
description: A pile of brown cardboard boxes of varying sizes, sealed with tape and marked with shipping labels and 'MoveOn' branding. The boxes are stacked in a casual, slightly uneven arrangement.
description_view_0: This view shows the front and left sides of the pile, with the 'MoveOn' branding and shipping symbols clearly visible on several box faces.
description_view_1: From this angle, the right side of the stack is visible, highlighting the tallest box at the back and the overlapping arrangement of the boxes.
description_view_2: The rear and top faces of the boxes are visible, with more box tops and tape seams exposed, and less branding apparent.
description_view_3: This view shows the right and rear sides, with the tallest box and several overlapping boxes creating a sense of depth and layering.
